score.use_scope: Exploratory review only; no patient-adjacent use.

R2R_3_readme_test_ci_alignment.evidence: Test/CI surfaces are present and locally consistent.

R2R_D2_missing_clinical_use_boundary.evidence: Clinical-adjacent surfaces exist without an explicit non-diagnostic/non-clinical boundary.

B2_bias_limitations.evidence: Bias, limitation, or validation-boundary language detected.

B3_coi_funding.evidence: COI, funding, sponsor, or acknowledgement language detected.

stage_3_raw_total.evidence: Raw rubric total before normalization to 100.

S4_environment_lock_evidence.evidence: Environment, dependency, or lock manifest detected.

S4_exact_dependency_pins_or_hashes.evidence: Dependency manifests exist but no exact pins or hashes were detected.

S4_dataset_url.evidence: Dataset URL or data source reference detected.

S4_model_weight_url_or_checksum.evidence: Documentation exists but no model artifact URL/checksum evidence was detected.

S4_cli_entrypoint.evidence: CLI entry point or argparse interface detected.

S4_runnable_examples.evidence: Runnable example, notebook, or demo file exists.

stage_4_raw_total.evidence: Raw Stage 4 rubric total. Stage 4 is reported separately and does not alter final score in v1.3.0.

method: Deterministic local CLI scan. No LLM, network, or runtime test execution is required.

measurement_basis.stage_1: BIO_TERMS regex match in README; disclaimer phrase presence/absence
measurement_basis.stage_2r: Vocabulary overlap between README, package metadata, docs, and test/CI files
measurement_basis.stage_3_T3: CHANGELOG.md, CHANGELOG, or NEWS.md file exists
measurement_basis.stage_3_B1: requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, or environment.yml file exists
measurement_basis.stage_3_B2: bias/limitation vocabulary present in README and docs (regex)
measurement_basis.stage_3_B3: funding/sponsor/COI vocabulary present in README, docs, or FUNDING.md (regex)
measurement_basis.stage_4: Deterministic replication evidence lane: containers, reproducibility targets, lock/pin/hash evidence, README reproducibility sections, dataset/model artifact references, citation metadata, CLI/seed/example signals
measurement_basis.ca_severity: Clinical/diagnostic term regex match in README, docs, and package metadata
measurement_basis.C1: Hardcoded key pattern regex (AWS AKIA*, sk-*, ghp_*, api_key=...)
measurement_basis.C2: == or hash pin vs >=, ~=, <, > in dependency manifest
measurement_basis.C3: Patient metadata patterns in deprecated/legacy/archive directories (regex)
measurement_basis.C4: except Exception: pass or except: pass pattern (regex)
measurement_basis.score_cap: Score ceiling applied when clinical-adjacent signals lack explicit disclaimer
